pillars.title: Operating Model Design
pillars.body: Shaping how work is structured, delivered and measured, aligning process, performance and capability so an organisation can deliver reliably and scale.

pillars.title: Programme & Transformation Delivery
pillars.body: Translating strategic intent into measurable operational outcomes, leading complex, cross-functional change from definition through to delivery and sustained adoption.

pillars.title: Data-led Performance & Governance
pillars.body: Establishing governance frameworks, KPIs and reporting cadence that improve visibility, accountability and decision-making, turning data into better performance.

pillars.title: Cross-functional Stakeholder Alignment
pillars.body: Bringing engineering, quality and operations together to deliver coordinated outcomes, with the influence to move teams who do not report to me.
